message.content:
Let me analyze the current state: 1. The stage goal is: "Create webpage 4 and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4." 2. The validators that will run are: - shared-nav-all-pages: failure_class=shared_state - page-4-links-page-3: failure_class=link_integrity 3. Existing files show: - site/index.html - has nav with Home, Page 2, Page 3 - site/page-2.html - has nav with Home, Page 2, Page 3 - site/page-3.html - has nav with Home, Page 2, Page 3 So I need to: 1. Create site/page-4.html with navigation links to all 4 pages (Home/Page 1, Page 2, Page 3, Page 4) 2. Update the nav in index.html, page-2.html, and page-3.html to also include Page 4 The shared-nav-all-pages validator will check that all pages have consistent navigation with links to pages 1-4. The page-4-links-page-3 validator will check that page 4 links back to page 3. Let me create the JSON response with all 4 files updated. { "files": [ { "path": "site/index.html", "content": " My Website
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome

This is the main content of the page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": " Page 2
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 2

This is the second page of the website.

Back to home

" }, { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": " Page 3
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 3

This is the third page of the website.

Back to page 2

" }, { "path": "site/page-4.html", "content": " Page 4
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Page 4

This is the fourth page of the website.

Back to page 3

" } ], "notes": "Created page-4.html with shared navigation across all pages, updated nav on index.html, page-2.html, and page-3.html to include Page 4 link." }
